$comment: Claim set for the Age Verification credential. Shared by the W3C VC 2.0 (credentialSubject) and SD-JWT VC (disclosed payload) representations. JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.
title: Age Verification claim set

birthdate.description: Full date of birth (ISO 8601 full-date). PRIVACY: must never be mandatory-disclosed when an age-over predicate suffices.

age_over_13.description: Predicate: holder is at least 13 years old.

age_over_18.description: Predicate: holder is at least 18 years old.

age_over_21.description: Predicate: holder is at least 21 years old.
